title: taraxacum limosum
intro: Taraxacum limosum, also known as lowland dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus that is native to Eastern Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help to reduce inflammation and prevent infection. The plant is also rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals such as potassium and iron, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet and offering potential health benefits including reduced blood pressure and improved digestion. Taraxacum limosum can be used to make herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
